# The Veritas

> The Veritas is an Indian digital news publication focused on world affairs, India, politics, business, science, law, lifestyle, sports, and editorial desk coverage.

## Canonical Site
- https://www.theveritas.in/

## Key Public Sections
- Home: https://www.theveritas.in/
- Live Monitor: https://www.theveritas.in/live
- The Veritas Desk: https://www.theveritas.in/trending
- Privacy Policy: https://www.theveritas.in/privacy
- Terms of Use: https://www.theveritas.in/terms

## Crawling Guidance
- Public articles may be indexed and summarized with attribution.
- Do not index or use `/cms` or `/editors` routes.
- Prefer canonical article URLs under `/article/`.

## Sitemap
- https://www.theveritas.in/sitemap.xml
